description: NetServiceBrowser scans for _home-assistant._tcp services on local network via Bonjour/mDNS. Resolved instances contain server URL, location name, and version.

flow_steps.details: NetServiceBrowser performs mDNS query for HA instances on local network.

flow_steps.code: public func netServiceDidResolveAddress(_ sender: NetService) { let serviceDict = NetService.dictionary(fromTXTRecord: txtRecord) ... }
flow_steps.details: Discovered HA server metadata (URL, name, version) extracted from mDNS TXT record.

flow_steps.code: private func discoveredHomeAssistant(bonjourName:, netServiceDictionary:) throws -> DiscoveredHomeAssistant
flow_steps.details: mDNS response parsed into DiscoveredHomeAssistant model with server URL and metadata.

description: User manually enters HA server URL. URL validated for connectivity and stored for connection.

flow_steps.details: User presented with URL text input field during onboarding.
Server URL stored in Server model for OAuth2 authentication.

description: App declares NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription and NSBonjourServices for local network discovery and communication with HA instance.

flow_steps.details: Onboarding permission screen requests local network access.

flow_steps.code: <key>NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription</key><string>Locate and communicate with your Home Assistant instance.</string>
flow_steps.details: iOS local network permission declaration for mDNS discovery.
